mapper.insert:
insert ignore into wecom_message ( msg_id, room_id, from_user, wthr_from_cm, to_list, single_receiver_id, msg_body, msg_type, acs_key, msg_time_long, msg_time, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.msgId}, #{item.roomId}, #{item.fromUser}, #{item.wthrFromCm}, #{item.toList}, #{item.singleReceiverId}, #{item.msgBody}, #{item.msgType}, #{item.acsKey}, #{item.msgTimeLong}, #{item.msgTime}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: select distinct room_id from wecom_message where room_id is not null and room_id != '' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime}
select distinct from_user from wecom_message where (room_id is null or room_id = '') and wthr_from_cm = 'N' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime}
select distinct from_user from wecom_message where (room_id is null or room_id = '') and wthr_from_cm = 'Y' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime}
select distinct single_receiver_id from wecom_message where (room_id is null or room_id = '') and single_receiver_id is not null and single_receiver_id != '' and msg_time >= #{activeFromTime}

select m.msg_id as msgId, m.msg_type as msgType, m.msg_time as msgTime, m.from_user as fromUser, case when m.wthr_from_cm = 'Y' then e.name else c.cust_name end as fromUserName, case when m.wthr_from_cm = 'Y' then 'EMPLOYEE' else 'CUSTOMER' end as fromUserType, m.msg_body as msgBody from wecom_message m left join wecom_employee e on m.from_user = e.employee_id and m.wthr_from_cm = 'Y' left join wecom_customer c on m.from_user = c.cust_id and m.wthr_from_cm = 'N' where m.room_id = #{roomId} and m.msg_time >= #{startTime} and m.msg_time <= #{endTime} order by m.msg_time asc, m.msg_id asc
